/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wall -Wextra -O2 CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/tests/test_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/src/server/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/src/server/request_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/src/server/response_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/src/server/file_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/src/server/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_server.dir/src/utils/socket_utils.cpp.o -o test_server
